heroIntro: Specialising in enhancing your natural beauty through our three core services: Microblading, bespoke personalised artwork, and professional tattooing. Our mission is to provide a transformative experience, ensuring each client leaves feeling confident and revitalized.
servicesIntro: Our studio is designed to be a sanctuary where artistry meets precision, offering safe and effective solutions tailored to your unique aesthetic desires.
meetText1: I'm Louise Curel, business owner and artistic director at Tiger's Eyes. My goal is to help you feel completely at ease with your semi-permanent make-up while creating a beautifully defined version of you.
meetText2: With a focus on artistry, precision and a welcoming atmosphere, I make sure every client feels comfortable from the moment they walk in. Join me on your journey to a stunning new look.

cards.title: Microblading
cards.text: Soft, natural, bespoke brows using the latest 'Nano Blade' techniques — perfect brows, every day. Includes top-up after 6–8 weeks.

cards.title: Bespoke Artwork
cards.text: Detailed personalised artwork created with a person's passion in mind — your chosen message or name running right through the design.

cards.title: Tattoos
cards.text: Professional bespoke designs tailored to your request — including two-part tattoos for you and a loved one, and cover-ups.
